jobs.title: Principal ZK Cryptographer
jobs.description_md:
Push the frontier of recursive proofs and zkVMs — open-source first, shipped to mainnet.

Stride is a 12–20-person Seed team building Solana validator infrastructure. You turn cutting-edge proving research into code that runs in production. The role is fully remote (EMEA); salary is transparent and listed up front, and includes token or equity upside.
responsibilities: Implement proving systems and circuits in Rust
Cut proving time and memory across the prover stack
Translate cryptography papers into audited production code
Contribute upstream to the ZK open-source ecosystem
requirements: 10+ years in applied cryptography or ZK engineering
Hands-on with Halo2, Plonky3, or comparable proving stacks
Strong Rust and a solid grasp of SNARK/STARK internals
The ability to read and implement directly from papers

json_ld.title: Principal ZK Cryptographer
json_ld.description:
Push the frontier of recursive proofs and zkVMs — open-source first, shipped to mainnet.

Stride is a 12–20-person Seed team building Solana validator infrastructure. You turn cutting-edge proving research into code that runs in production. The role is fully remote (EMEA); salary is transparent and listed up front, and includes token or equity upside.

nice_to_have: Comfort collaborating fully async across timezones
Open-source contributions in the crypto or AI space
A public body of work — talks, posts, or shipped projects
jobs.one_liner: Push the frontier of recursive proofs and zkVMs — open-source first, shipped to mainnet.

jobs.title: Staff Smart Contract Engineer, DeFi
jobs.description_md:
Build the DeFi primitives — AMMs, lending markets, perps — the next wave of onchain finance runs on.

Modular is a 40–60-person Series A team building modular DeFi primitives. You own a product surface end to end, from mechanism design to mainnet. The role is fully remote (APAC); salary is transparent and listed up front.
responsibilities: Implement DeFi mechanisms in Solidity with strong invariants
Model economic attack surfaces and edge-case behavior
Optimize for gas without ever compromising safety
Ship upgrades behind timelocks and governance
requirements: 8+ years of Solidity, with shipped DeFi protocols behind you
Deep understanding of AMM, lending, and perp mechanics
Comfort reasoning about economic and MEV attack vectors
A Foundry-first testing discipline

json_ld.title: Staff Smart Contract Engineer, DeFi
json_ld.description:

Modular is a 40–60-person Series A team building modular DeFi primitives. You own a product surface end to end, from mechanism design to mainnet. The role is fully remote (APAC); salary is transparent and listed up front.

nice_to_have: Familiarity with the broader L2 and rollup landscape
Prior experience taking a product from zero to mainnet
Experience at an early-stage or remote-first startup
jobs.one_liner: Build the DeFi primitives — AMMs, lending markets, perps — the next wave of onchain finance runs on.

jobs.title: Senior Solidity Engineer
jobs.description_md:
Design and ship the smart contracts at the center of the protocol — money-moving code, held to the highest bar.

Lattice is a 25–40-person Series A team building ZK research and zkVMs. Every line you write is adversarially tested and immutable once deployed. The role is fully remote (Europe); salary is transparent and listed up front, and includes token or equity upside.
responsibilities: Architect and implement Solidity contracts with Foundry
Write exhaustive test suites, invariants, and fuzz harnesses
Drive gas optimization across the contract surface
Coordinate audits and own the deployment runbook
requirements: 5+ years writing production Solidity deployed to mainnet
Fluency with Foundry, the EVM, and common DeFi primitives
A security-first instinct — you think in exploits, not happy paths
Experience coordinating external audits end to end

jobs.title: Senior ML Infrastructure Engineer
jobs.description_md:
Own the inference infrastructure — the GPU fleet and serving stack that keeps onchain AI fast and cheap.

Helios is a 50–90-person Series B team building Bitcoin L2 and Lightning. You are the difference between a demo and a system that scales. The role is fully remote (Europe); salary is transparent and listed up front, and includes token or equity upside.
responsibilities: Build and operate low-latency model-serving infrastructure
Optimize GPU utilization and inference cost
Run the Kubernetes platform hosting the workloads
Instrument everything — latency, throughput, spend
requirements: 5+ years in ML infrastructure or platform engineering
Hands-on GPU scheduling, Triton, or similar serving stacks
Strong Kubernetes and observability fundamentals
A bias for measuring before optimizing

jobs.title: Senior Smart Contract Auditor
jobs.description_md:
Break smart contracts before attackers do — review, fuzz, and harden the code that guards real value.

Vertex is a 35–55-person Series A team building an onchain perpetuals exchange. Your sign-off is the last line before mainnet. The role is fully remote (Europe); salary is transparent and listed up front.
responsibilities: Audit Solidity contracts for economic and technical exploits
Build fuzzing and invariant suites that find real bugs
Write clear findings with concrete, prioritized fixes
Partner with engineering to close gaps for good
requirements: 5+ years auditing or attacking smart contracts
Deep Solidity, EVM, and DeFi exploit knowledge
Hands-on with Foundry fuzzing, Echidna, or similar
A relentless, adversarial reading of every line

jobs.title: Founding Frontend Engineer
jobs.description_md:
Set the frontend foundations — own the stack, the patterns, and the bar for everything built after you.

Beam is a 20–35-person Series A team building onchain AI developer tooling. You will have unusual scope and the autonomy to use it. The role is fully remote (EMEA); salary is transparent and listed up front.
responsibilities: Establish the frontend architecture and component system
Ship the first user-facing product surfaces end to end
Wire onchain data and wallet UX with wagmi and viem
Set the craft bar and help hire the team behind you
requirements: 10+ years of frontend, including time as an early engineer
Deep Next.js, TypeScript, and design-system experience
Onchain frontend experience — wallets, signing, indexing
Comfort owning ambiguity and making fast, sound calls

jobs.description_md:

Halcyon is a 22–38-person Series A team building restaking and shared security. You ship developer experience, you do not just talk about it. The role is fully remote (EMEA); salary is transparent and listed up front, and includes token or equity upside.
responsibilities: Build and maintain SDKs, examples, and starter kits
Write documentation and tutorials developers actually finish
Turn developer feedback into product and DX improvements

Excellent technical writing and communication
Genuine empathy for the developer experience

jobs.title: Research Scientist, Cryptography
jobs.description_md:
Do original cryptography research — and see it shipped, not shelved.

Cipher is a 5–10-person bootstrapped team building wallet security and MPC. You publish, prototype, and hand off to engineering for production. The role is fully remote (Europe); salary is transparent and listed up front, and includes token or equity upside.
responsibilities: Research new proving systems and cryptographic protocols
Prototype results and validate them against real workloads
Publish papers and contribute to open standards
Partner with engineers to productionize what works

Depth in proving systems, lattices, or related areas
Strong enough Rust to prototype your own ideas
A track record of research that actually shipped

jobs.description_md:

Build autonomous agents that operate fully onchain — trading, governing, and coordinating without a human in the loop.

Connect LLM reasoning to onchain execution, safely
Design evals for agent reliability and economic safety
Publish findings and open-source reference implementations
requirements: 10+ years across ML and crypto, or deep expertise in one

Working knowledge of Solidity and onchain execution
Comfort in ambiguous, research-heavy problem spaces

Improve block propagation and p2p networking throughput
Write rigorous specs and shepherd them from testnet to mainnet
Debug live network incidents and lead the post-mortems
requirements: 3+ years building distributed systems or blockchain protocols

Experience with consensus (BFT, PoS) or p2p networking
Comfort working in an open-source, spec-driven codebase

Familiarity with BFT-family protocols and their failure modes
A track record shipping protocol upgrades to a live network

Helix Labs is a 60–120-person Series B team building zkEVM rollup infrastructure. This is deep systems work: you sit in the critical path of every block produced. The role is fully remote (Worldwide); salary is transparent and listed up front.
responsibilities: Design and ship consensus-layer changes in Rust
Improve block propagation and p2p networking throughput
Write rigorous specs and shepherd them from testnet to mainnet
Debug live network incidents and lead the post-mortems
requirements: 1+ years building distributed systems or blockchain protocols
Strong Rust or Go, with a feel for low-level performance
Experience with consensus (BFT, PoS) or p2p networking
Comfort working in an open-source, spec-driven codebase

jobs.title: Junior Solidity Engineer
jobs.description_md:
Design and ship the smart contracts at the center of the protocol — money-moving code, held to the highest bar.

Helix Labs is a 60–120-person Series B team building zkEVM rollup infrastructure. Every line you write is adversarially tested and immutable once deployed. The role is fully remote (Worldwide); salary is transparent and listed up front, and includes token or equity upside.
responsibilities: Architect and implement Solidity contracts with Foundry
Write exhaustive test suites, invariants, and fuzz harnesses
Drive gas optimization across the contract surface
Coordinate audits and own the deployment runbook
requirements: 1+ years writing production Solidity deployed to mainnet
Fluency with Foundry, the EVM, and common DeFi primitives
A security-first instinct — you think in exploits, not happy paths
Experience coordinating external audits end to end

jobs.title: Junior ML Infrastructure Engineer
jobs.description_md:
Own the inference infrastructure — the GPU fleet and serving stack that keeps onchain AI fast and cheap.

Forge is a 6–12-person bootstrapped team building smart contract security and audits. You are the difference between a demo and a system that scales. The role is fully remote (Worldwide); salary is transparent and listed up front, and includes token or equity upside.

Optimize GPU utilization and inference cost
Run the Kubernetes platform hosting the workloads
Instrument everything — latency, throughput, spend
requirements: 1+ years in ML infrastructure or platform engineering

Strong Kubernetes and observability fundamentals
A bias for measuring before optimizing

jobs.title: Junior Smart Contract Auditor
jobs.description_md:
Break smart contracts before attackers do — review, fuzz, and harden the code that guards real value.

Cosmoship is a 9–16-person Seed team building Cosmos IBC infrastructure. Your sign-off is the last line before mainnet. The role is fully remote (Worldwide); salary is transparent and listed up front.
responsibilities: Audit Solidity contracts for economic and technical exploits
Build fuzzing and invariant suites that find real bugs
Write clear findings with concrete, prioritized fixes
Partner with engineering to close gaps for good
requirements: 1+ years auditing or attacking smart contracts
Deep Solidity, EVM, and DeFi exploit knowledge
Hands-on with Foundry fuzzing, Echidna, or similar
A relentless, adversarial reading of every line

jobs.title: Junior ZK Cryptographer
jobs.description_md:
Push the frontier of recursive proofs and zkVMs — open-source first, shipped to mainnet.

Helix Labs is a 60–120-person Series B team building zkEVM rollup infrastructure. You turn cutting-edge proving research into code that runs in production. The role is fully remote (Worldwide); salary is transparent and listed up front, and includes token or equity upside.
responsibilities: Implement proving systems and circuits in Rust
Cut proving time and memory across the prover stack
Translate cryptography papers into audited production code
Contribute upstream to the ZK open-source ecosystem
requirements: 1+ years in applied cryptography or ZK engineering
Hands-on with Halo2, Plonky3, or comparable proving stacks
Strong Rust and a solid grasp of SNARK/STARK internals
The ability to read and implement directly from papers

jobs.title: Research Scientist, Cryptography
jobs.description_md:
Do original cryptography research — and see it shipped, not shelved.

Prism is a 8–15-person Seed team building onchain data and analytics. You publish, prototype, and hand off to engineering for production. The role is fully remote (Worldwide); salary is transparent and listed up front, and includes token or equity upside.
responsibilities: Research new proving systems and cryptographic protocols
Prototype results and validate them against real workloads
Publish papers and contribute to open standards
Partner with engineers to productionize what works
requirements: 1+ years in cryptography research, or a PhD plus practice
Depth in proving systems, lattices, or related areas
Strong enough Rust to prototype your own ideas
A track record of research that actually shipped

jobs.title: Founding Frontend Engineer
jobs.description_md:
Set the frontend foundations — own the stack, the patterns, and the bar for everything built after you.

Forge is a 6–12-person bootstrapped team building smart contract security and audits. You will have unusual scope and the autonomy to use it. The role is fully remote (Worldwide); salary is transparent and listed up front.
responsibilities: Establish the frontend architecture and component system
Ship the first user-facing product surfaces end to end
Wire onchain data and wallet UX with wagmi and viem
Set the craft bar and help hire the team behind you
requirements: 1+ years of frontend, including time as an early engineer
Deep Next.js, TypeScript, and design-system experience
Onchain frontend experience — wallets, signing, indexing
Comfort owning ambiguity and making fast, sound calls
